dictionary_sections.contextual_meaning: In context, RESERVED SIGNAL CONTINUITY GAP ID1146 is not treated as an isolated label. It is read through the nearby source passage: \Delta\theta)$ Formal Technical Dissertation: The stabilizing torque function derived from simulation. Unlike the classical $-\sin(\Delta\theta)$, the Pi-Ladder model utilizes a $2\Delta\theta$ dependence, creating bi-stable locking points that enhance resonance capture. Source: [19] [ID 1146] STOCHASTIC SPIN EVOLUTION Canonical Statutory Formula: $\omega_{n+1} = \omega_n + \tau(\theta)dt + \sigma \xi \sqrt{dt}$ Formal Technical Dissertation: The evolution equation for spin state under noise. This keeps the dictionary explanation tied to the mathematical usage that produced the recovered formula.
